title: Foo Bar ClickHouse TTL Lifecycle
description: Design a ClickHouse table with TTL so that raw events older than 90 days are automatically dropped. Create the table and verify the TTL expression is correct.

tasks.description: Create or alter analytics.raw_events with a TTL on the timestamp column so rows older than 90 days are removed.

infrastructure.description: ClickHouse. Create analytics.raw_events with TTL for automatic retention management.
